---
title: "Fancheng Xia"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:your_email@address.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/fanchengxia/
---

I am a graduate student in MSBA with interests in data analytics, machine learning, and business strategy.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
